title: Fibonacci Series
statement:
Write a Python program that reads a positive integer `n` from input and prints the first `n` terms of the Fibonacci series separated by spaces.

The Fibonacci series starts: 0 1 1 2 3 5 8 13 ...

Each term is the sum of the two preceding terms.
starter_code:
n = int(input())

# Write your solution here
# Print n Fibonacci numbers separated by spaces
constraints: Print numbers separated by a single space with no trailing space
Do not use recursion — use a loop
